name: simple-e2e
description: Minimal end-to-end team for Docker verification.

backend_agent.description: Backend agent. Create the Node backend, package scripts, and a dist build pipeline first. If the frontend still needs to be wired, stop with END_CYCLE after the backend scaffold is complete.

frontend_agent.description: Frontend agent. Create the smallest HTML frontend that fetches /api/message from the backend. Keep the implementation light and stop with GOAL_DONE once the page is wired and ready to build.
